title: Lungleiah Healthy Lunglei App tihlar beihpui thlak dan tur sawi ho a ni
content:
5067/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 1:Vawiin khan Lunglei DC Office, Health & Family Welfare leh I&PR official-te leh Young Mizo Association (YMA) Sub-Headquarters Lunglei hruaitute chu Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann hovin a hna thawh pindanah an ṭhu khawm a. Lunglei District mipuite'n hriselna ṭha zawk an neih theih nana Healthy Lunglei District Campaign hnuaia hma lakna leh mahni awm hmun aṭanga awlsam taka inentirna appointment lak theihna leh online-a damdawi chah theihna tura tlangzarh tak, LushAI Healthy Lunglei (LHL) App mipuite'n ṭangkai zawka an hman theih nana tihlar beihpui thlak tur chungchang an sawi ho.

Healthy Lunglei App chungchanga Information, Education and Communication (IEC) campaign chu May thla aṭanga kalpui tum niin, ni sawm li chhung (40 Days Campaign) kalpui tura ruahman a ni a. Campaign chhung hian YMA branch hrang hrang leh college-ah te hriselna dinhmun endikna (health screening) te, hriselna leh LHL App chungchang inzirtirna leh intihsiakna te buatsaih a ni ang a. Ni 40 chhunga campaign zawh hnuah App download tam leh hmang ṭhate hnenah lawmman siam a ni bawk ang.

LushAI Healthy Lunglei app hmang hian district chhunga sawrkar damdawi in leh health centre-a daktawrte ṭhut hun tur a en theih bakah, OPD-a inentir turin appointment a lak lawk (book) theih a. ABHA-a inziah luhna te, he app-a inziak lut damdawi dawr (pharmacy)-te aṭanga damdawi chah theihna te awmin, hriselna lama hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrangte pawh awlsam takin a hmuh theih a. OPD appointment laknaa pui thei tur leh zawhna hrang hrang Mizo ṭawnga chhang thei tur AI chatbot dah tel a ni bawk a.

Android hmangte tanhttps://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lushaihealthylunglei.androidaṭangin leh iOS hmangte tanhttps://apps.apple.com/in/app/lhl/id6755673586aṭangin download theih a ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN DIALYSIS THAR HAWNG
content:
5065/2025-2026

Aizawl the 1st April 2026:Vawiin khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan Serchhip District Hospital-a Dialysis Unit thar a hawng.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan khawtlang hruaitute inpekna zarah Serchhip District Hospital-ah Dialysis khawl hi hawn a lo ni ta a, tha taka hna a thawh theih nan mamawh dang la awm angte pawh ngaihtuah belh zel a ni ang.  A thawktu tur ten theitawp chhuahin, Pathian rawngbawlna a ni tih hre chungin lo thawk ula, natna khirh tuar, inenkawlna nei si lo an lo kal pawhin lo ngaihsak hram hram ang che u. Thawktute inthlahdah vanga damlote tawrhna hi thleng lo se, hah chung chung pawhin, nunna chhanna a nih avangin lo thawk hram zel ang che u, tiin a chah a. Kan khawl leh thawktute Pathianin malsawm che u sela, nangmahni kal tlanga damna a lo thlen ka duh a ni, a ti.

Mizo te zingah AIDS, cancer leh natna khirh tak tak vei kan tam ta lutuk hi kan duh kan thlang sual deuh em ni aw a tih theih a. Natna tam tak kan pumpelh theih a awm a, kan nun kan uluk hi a tul a ni. Pathian hian kan hrisel hi a phal a, kan hausakte pawh a phal a ni tih hi hria ila, kan damna hi Pathian hnenah a awm a, kan thing leh mau leh nungchate pawh zalen se, mipuite pawh hrisel ila, Pathian malsawmna kan dawng zel ang a ti.

Serchhip damdawi in building sak pawhin hma a sawn ve zel a, Main Building tur sakna tur crore 50 dawn fel a ni tawh a, tender chhuah a, hnathawh chhunzawm thuai a ni ang, a ti bawk.

Dr. Lalhriatpuia Chhangte, SMO chuan Techincal report a pe a, khawl hi 2025 ah an dawng a, thawktu Doctor 1,Technician1, Staff nurse 2 leh RO incharge 1 in an enkawl dawn a. Naktuk (2.4.2026) atangin dialysis hi tih tan nghal tum a nih thu a sawi.

Khawl 2 hmangin, chawhmaah mi 2 leh chawhnu mi 2 a vaiin ni khatah mi 4 an enkawl thei dawn a.chawlhkar khatah mi pakhat tan vawi 2 a tih theih dawn a ni. Sawrkar chawlhah leh thla tin inrinni vawi hnihna an awl thin ang. Natna khirh bik Hepatitis leh HIV veite erawh chu a hranpaa enkawlna pek ngai an nih avangin dialysis hi an tih sak thei rih dawn lo a ni.

Pi R. Vanlalhmangaihzuali, UDC chuan Financial report pe in Dialysis khawl bunna senso atan hian MLA fund Rs. 15,04,000 leh Technician hlawh tur Rs. 1,38,000 an dawn thu a sawi.

He hun hi District Medical Siperintendent Dr. ZD Lalmuanawman a kaihruai a. Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma, SP Pu Gavit Gogna bakah khawtlang hruaitute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: MISA General Conference 2026 hman a ni
content:
5064/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 01 April 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Information Service Association (MISA) chuan I&PR Conference Hall, Lianchhiari Run-ah kum 2026 MISA General Conference an hmang a. He hun hi Pi Betsy Zothanpari Sailo, IPRP&S Department Secretary chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

He hunah hian khuallian Pi Betsy Zothanpari Sailo, IPRP&S Department Secretary chuan MISA member-te fuihna thu leh lut tharte lawmna thu sawiin, MISA Conference hlawhtling taka hman theih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. MISA member-te chu intuaithar a, ram leh hnam tana chhenfakawm lehzuala sawrkar kum thar tana inhlan thar turin a chah a. Mipui vantlang tana information pawimawhna leh sawrkar hmel tar langtu an nihna dinhmun pawimawhnate ngun taka ngaihtuah a, Conference chu hlawk taka hmang theuh turin duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

MISA General Conference hi chawhma lamah hawnna hun hman niin, nikum lama MPSC buatsaih Civil Services Combined Competitive Examination-a lut thar MIS officer-te lawm luh nghal an ni a. Chawhnu lamah rorelna leh MJA General Headquarters hruaitute kaihhruaiin 2026-28 atana MISA hruaitu tur thlanna hun hman nghal a ni.

MISA General Conference hawnna pual inkhawm hi Pu Pratap Chhetri, Vice President, MISA chuan kaihruaiin,  Pu Malsawmsanga, President, MISA-in kal khawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Pu Andrew H.  Lalremruata, General Secretary, MISA hnen atangin report ngaihthlak niin, Pi K. Vanlalsangi, I&PR Director & MISA Patron hnen atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni a. Pi C. Lalremruati, Treasurer, MISA-in lawmthu sawiin hawnna hun hi a khar a ni.

title: TUIALHTHEI LEH EIRAWNGBAWLNA GAS COMMON/HELPLINE CENTRE LEH MONITORING CELL KOLASIBAH DIN A NI
content:
5063/2025-2026

Kolasib, 1st April, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan Deputy Commissioner Office Chamber, Kolasib-ah Kolasib District chhunga tuialhthei leh eirawngbawlna gas (LPG & POL) dinhmun vil turin 'Common/Helpline leh Monitoring Cell' din a ni a. He thutkhawm hi Kolasib District Bawrhsap Pu H. Dolianbuaia'n a kaihhruai.

Bawrhsap Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan he thutkhawm koh a nih chhan sawifiahin, Mizoram Chief Secretary in District Bawrhsap-te chu LPG leh POL stock awm zat leh sem chhuah dan uluk taka vil a, chhek ruk (hoarding), man to zawka hralh (black marketing), leh kawng dik lo va lak pen a nih loh nana hma la tura a hriattirna bawhzui a nih thu a sawi a. Kolasib District-ah pawh sorkar thuchhuah angin, danin a phalsak bak mimal hnenah tuialhthei leh eirawngbawlna gas hralh chhuah a rem loh thu a tarlang bawk a ni.

He thutkhawmah hian District mipuiten LPG leh Diesel/Petrol sem chhuah chungchanga harsatna an tawh emaw, chhek ru (hoarding) leh man to zawka hralh (black marketing) an hriat a, thuneitute hnena thlen zung zung theih nan Common/Helpline Joint Control Room siam a ni a, District Monitoring Cell din nghal a ni bawk.

Joint Control Room Member-te:

* Deputy Commissioner, Kolasib* Superintendent of Police, Kolasib* District Civil Supply Officer, Kolasib* Asstt. Controller, Legal Metrology, Kolasib

Mipui ten thil diklo an hriat a an biakpawh theihna tur Helpline Number-te:

* 9402173751 (DCSO, Kolasib)* 8794889303 (Asstt. Controller, Legal Metrology)

District Monitoring Cell:

* Convener: District Civil Supply Officer (DCSO), Kolasib* Asstt. Convener: Sub-Deputy Magistrate (SDC), Kolasib* Member-te: Officer In-Charge (OC) Police, Asstt. Controller Legal Metrology, leh District Information & Public Relations Officer (DIPRO).

title: DISTRICT COOPERATION DEVELOPMENT COMMITTEE (DCDC), LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT THUTKHAWMNA NEIH A NI
content:
5062/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 1st April, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 2:00PM khan DC Conference Hall, Lawngtlai ah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaina in District Cooperation Development Committee (DCDC), Lawngtlai District thutkhawmna neih a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Kan District bik ah Cooperation Department hi ti tuai thar ngai leh bul tan thar ngai kan ni a, Mipuiin kan varpawh theih na atan 'Formation of Co-operation Societies & Formation Drive' awareness campaign, LADC & CADC area ah neih kan ngai a ni a ti. Tun hnaiah LADC lam in tan la tharin hma an la mek chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawm ah hian Awareness neih dan turte, Society Online Registration, Formation of PACS leh Computerization of MPACS, Formatiin of Project under Banakaih, RKVY, PMFP, PMBJK, Petrol Outlet & Storage of Petrol and diesel for PACS ah te hmalak dan tur thlir hona neih a ni. Tun dinhmunah LADC hnuai ah Societies 304 a awm a, PACS hnaui ah Town Area & chehvel Society - 39 leh MPACS hnuai ah Societies -33 awmin, active lo a tam zawk an nih thu LADC lam atanga ngaihthlak a ni a. Hun bi tuk siamin LADC leh CADC ah Societies te registration tih nun theihte tih nun leh tih nun theih loh te Fresh a in register tura hmalak nise tih a ni. Monthly online meeting for monitoring of the progress neih chungchang sawiho a ni bawk. Society kalphun Guidline mumal tak LADC lamin ruahman mek a nih thu ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

Thutkhawm ah hian memberte an kal tha hle a, Bawrhsap chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: DISTRICT TRANSFORMATION PLAN FOR LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT THUTKHAWMNA NEIH A NI
content:
5061/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 1st April, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00PM khan Deputy Commissioner's Office Chamber, Lawngtlai ah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaina in District Transformation Plan for Lawngtlai District thutkhawmna neih a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Mizoram Sorkar in District tin Bawrhsapte District hmasawnna atana hmalakna tur atana a ruahman atangin kan plan siam te pawm in kan District tan Nuai 100 pek kan ni a, a sum pawh dawn anih tawh thu a sawi a ni. Administrative course atan Nuai 10 dah niin Works ah Nuai 90 dah anih thu a sawi bawk.

Hnathawh na tur plan awmsa ani a, Deputy Commissioner Office leh Concern department ten an kalpuk ang, contract ang a pek theih a ni lo tih a sawi bawk. Kan sum dawn te kan hmanthat leh thawh that dan a zirin nakum ah hmuh leh tur a nih thu a sawi.

Plan awmsa Installation of Road signage Lawngtlai Khawpui lunlai leh kawtthler a dah tur hi UD& PA, Department & LADC nen join spot identification neih nise tih a ni a, Farmgate Collection Unit/Hut at Phaikhang Zau Lawngtlai (KMMTTP) hi Horticulture department nena thawh tur ani. Computer set leina Lairam Nursing School tan a ruahmante, Medical Superintendent hnuai Mobile Medical Unit - Bolero Camper 4x4 Long Body Modified lei turte, X- Ray Building/ Room Sangau PHC sak turte, Public Garbage Disposal - TATA 610 SK Truck pahnih Sanitation Department, LADC tana lei turte, Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga Sikul tih changtlunna turte, CCTV & Studs Light Lawngtlai khawpui chhung a dah hi Police leh VC ten a dahna hmun tur te en fel nise tih a ni a, Model Village atana Chawnhu siam te a ni a, Plan te hi concern department leh VC ten ruahmanna leh verification neih nise, estimate te siam nise, JAM examtion leh tul hrang hrangte a chak thei ang bera buaipuiin, sum hmuh tawh a nih avangin a hma thei ang ber a hmalak, hnathawh tan nise tih a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm ah hian District Plan ah hian Sorkar leh LADC Official, District Plan a   Department concern leh VC te an telkim hle a, Bawrhsap chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: NASHA MUKT BHARAT ABHIYAN HNUAIA DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE ON DRUG FREE DISTRICT THUTKHAWMNA NEIH A NI
content:
5060/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 1st April, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00AM khan DC's Conference Hall, Lawngtlai ah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaina in NMBA hnuaia District Level Committee on Drug Free District thutkhawmna neih a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Member kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Lawngtlai District hma kan sawn zel theih nan Village fai na kawnga inelna Bawrhsap Award kalpui zel a ni thu leh LADC leh Sorkar tangkawp in Lawngtlai Khawpui traffice felfai leh khawpui faina kawng a hmalak na atan 'Stand Up Lawngtlai' kalpui a nih tur leh Lawngtlai khawpui atana Project Pali(4) DPR ruahman a nih thu a sawi a ni. Bawrhsap chuan Lawngtlai District Drug free kan nih thei na atan Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan(NMBA) hnuai ah Lawngtlai District Drug Free Committee din a nih thu sawiin, District Level, Block Level leh Village Level a hmalak anih tur thu a sawi bawk. Drug Free District kan nih ngei theih nan CYLA, VCs, NGOs leh Kohhran te theih tawp chhuahpui tur leh thawhpui turin a sawm nghal a ni.

District Bawrhsap Chairman na hnuai ah District Level Drug Free Committee hi Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyam hnuai a din niin Village-187 (LADC hnuaia Village- 99 leh CADC- hnuaia Village 88) a cover dawn a ni, hmalakna atana sum senso pawh NMBA atang a ni dawn a ni. Hmalakna tur atan ruahmanna siam niin District Level Drug Free Committee hnuai ah BDO kaihhruaina hnuai ah Block Level Drug Free Committee a awm ang a, Village Level ah VCP kaihhruaina hnuia ah Village Level Drug Free Committee din ani dawn a ni. Hemi in a tum ber chu Village Level a drug hmansualna tih reh leh tih bo a, kum naupangte drug hman sual laka venhim, Village Level a Drug do na kawnga tih chak, ruihhlo hman sualna avanga pawikhawihna (Crime) District a tih tlem leh NMBA hnuai a Certify Drug Free Village a puan hi a tum ber a ni. Block Level ah BDO te chu Verification Authority a ani ang a, Field Virification leh Monitoring Compliance an kutah a awm dawn ani. Ni 10 April, 2026 hian District District Level Drug free khuhhawnna neih nise tih rel a ni a, hemi hma hian Khawpui chhung bikah Village Level Drug Free Committee din nise tih a ni a, Ni 20 April, 2026 hma in Village Level Drug Free Committee din vek nise tih a ni bawk. Drug Free Village puan tur khua/veng te hian ni sawmkua (90 Days) chhunga an veng/khua drug hmansual leh zawrh kawng ah an fihlim a a ngai dawn a, District Level Drug Free Committee lam atangin Format te siam in, endik a nih a nih dawn avangin July 20, 2026 hma in District Level Drug Free Committee ah Village Level Drug Free Committee ten Drug Free an nihna an thehlut tur a ni. Independance Day ah Drug Free Village te puan a ni ang. Awareness Programme- Sangau Block & Bungtlang South Block ah kalpui tum nise tih a ni bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawm ah hian District Level Drug Free District memberte an telkim tha hle a, Bawrhsap chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: CHAMPHAIAH KUT HNATHAWKTUTE TAN VAWIIN KHAN TRAINING BUATSAIH
content:
5059/2025-2026

Dated Champhai, 1st April 2026:Vawiin khan Champhaiah Tung chin dan leh a karah thlai dang chin dan tur chungchangah kuthnathawktute tan training I&PR Auditorium, Chanem Buildingah buatsaih a ni.

He hun hi Pu F. Lalmalsawma, DAO Champhai chuan Tung hi tunhma chuan "Anchhia" tia sawi a nih thin thu tarlangin Champhai leh a chhehvelah pawh kung tam tak suat a lo nih tawh dan a tarlang a, tunah chuan Agriculture Department hmalaknain tharthawh leh mek a nih dan a tarlang bawk. Tung chin dan tur dik taka ching a, hlawk taka an tharchhuah theihna turin kuthnathawktute chu training hi tangkai taka hmang turin a chah a, zing taka chin chi a nih loh thu pawh tarlangin Oil Palm pawh a bul tantu an lo nih tawh dan a tarlang a, oil palm pawh hi a nih dan tur ang aia zinga ching te chuan an puitlin hnuah kung tam tak an kih a ngaih phah thin a, tung pawh hi chin dan tur dik tak leh hlawk taka an tharchhuah theihna tura thusawite uluk taka ngaithla turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Pi Lalhminghlui, ADAO, Champhai chuan kut hnathawktu Training a lo kal te tan an zirtur tlangpui tarlangin, tung hi varnish atan leh rawng atan tangkai taka hman thin a nih thu tarlangin a nih dan tura chingte tan sum tam zawk hailuh theihna a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Training-ah hian Pu Lalrambuatsaiha, SMS, KVK Champhai chuan kuthnathawktu kalkhawmte chu Tung chin dan tur kawng hrang hrang pawimawh tak tak a zirtir a, tung chin dan bakah vaimim leh behliang chin dan dik leh hlawk zawka kuthnathawktute'n an tharchhuah theih dan tur kawng hrang hrang ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

Kuthnathawktute hnena tung chin dan tur zirtirna hunah hian resource person ten zirtirna an pek bakah zawhna leh chhanna hun hman a ni. Training-ah hian North Khawbung, Melbuk, Zote leh Zotlang Phaizau leh Zotlanga WRC Paddy Farmers te an kalkhawm a ni.

Kumin chhung hian khaw 10 thlanchhuah - North Diltlang, Zotlang East, Hnahlan, North Khawbung, Selam, Melbuk, Bungzung, Vanzau leh Khawbungah te ram Ha. 350 a zauah tung ching tura ruahman a ni.

title: MLDB buatsaih thawnthutawi inziahsiak lawmman semna neih a ni
content:
5058/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl: the 01 April 2026:Vawiin khan Mizo Language Development Board (MLDB) buatsaih Thawnthutawi Inziahsiak lawmman semna hun chu ATI Auditorium, MINECO-ah hman a ni a. Pi Betsy Zothanpari, Secretary, IPR, P&S Department chuan khuallian niin he hun hi a hmanpui a ni.

Lawmman semna puala inkhawmah hian khuallian Pi Betsy Zothanpari, IPR, P&S Department Secretary chuan thusawiin, Mizo language Development Board-in Mizotawng hmasawnna atana Intihsiakna an buatsaih chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. khawvel hmasawn zelah mahni tawng bosala hnam dang tawng leh nunphungin thangtharte zingah hlauhawm khawpa Mizote min tibuai tan mek nia a hriat thu tarlangin, chu chu ram leh hnam hmasawnna daltu a nih mai a hlauhawm hle a ni a ti a. Thawnthu ziak tura intihsiaknaa telte thawhrimna chu ropui a tih thu sawiin, ziaktute pawhin hmasawnna nasa tak an chhar chhuah ngei a beisei tih a sawi a. MLDB leh Intihsiaknaa telte chu nasa leh zuala ram leh hnam hmasawnna atana ngaihtuahna seng zel turin a fuih nghal bawk a ni.

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN CHHIARPUI 2027 ATANA MAHNIA INZIAHLUH BUL TAN
content:
5057/2025-2026

Aizawl the 1st April 2026:Tukin dar 6:30 khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan a chenna inah Census of India 2027 Phase-I (Houselisting leh Housing Census) self-enumeration hlawhtling takin a nei zo a. India ram chhiarpui 2027 Mizorama bul tanna a ni.

Chief Minister hi Directorate of Census Operations, General Administration Department leh Aizawl Municipal Corporation officials pawimawhten an tawiawm a. Chhiarpui an kalpui zuina turah duhsakna a lo hlan a ni.

Census of India 2027 hi thawh hniha kalpui tur a ni a. Thawh hmasa zawk Houselisting leh Housing Census hi vawiin April 1, 2026 atanga tan a ni. Thawh hnihna Population Enumeration hi February 2027-ah neih tan tur a ni ang. Tun tum census hi digital hmanga census kalpui hmasak ber tur a ni dawn a, mahnia Self-Enumeration tih theih a ni.

Self-Enumeration hun hi April 1 atanga April 15, 2026 thleng a ni a, April 16 atanga May 15, 2026 thleng House Listing leh Housing Census Mizoram pumpui-ah kalpui a ni ang.

Mahnia inziaklut tur te chuan official portal (se.census.gov.in) ah mobile phone hmangin inziahluh theih a ni a. Form submit hnuah Self-Enumeration ID (SE ID) a lo chhuak (generate) ang a, hei hi enumerator-te an lo kal hunah lo pek tur a ni.

Chief Minister a inziahluh hnuah tukin zing dar 9:30 khan Pu K. Sapdanga, Home Minister pawh a chenna inah a inziaklut a, Pu Vanlalhlana, Public Works Department Minister pawh zing dar 9:00 ah a inziaklut bawk.

Sawrkar chuan chhiarpui hi tluang leh fel fai taka a kal theih nan khua leh tui te chu mahnia inziaklut turin a ngen a ni.
